  1058	//
  1059	// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect 2026-05-03 post-TB-12 ruling Part A
  1060	// §4.3 + §4.4 FR-13.1..7 + §4.5 CR-13.1..6).
  1061	//
  1062	// **Mathematical core**: `1 locked Coin = 1 YES_E + 1 NO_E`.
  1063	// `CompleteSetMintTx` debits Coin balance, locks it as `conditional_collateral_t`,
  1064	// mints equal YES_E + NO_E shares to the same owner. `CompleteSetRedeemTx`
  1065	// requires a system-resolved outcome reference and pays the winning side
  1066	// 1:1 against `conditional_collateral_t`. `MarketSeedTx` requires explicit
  1067	// provider funds; no auto-seed, no quote, no trade, no price.
  1068	//
  1069	// **Forbidden in TB-13** (architect §4.7): AMM / CPMM / orderbook /
  1070	// MarketOrderTx / MarketTradeTx / PriceIndex / DPMM / pro-rata / automatic
  1071	// liquidity / ghost liquidity / NodeMarketEntry as canonical state / f64.
  1072	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1073	
  1074	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): event identifier for
  1075	/// conditional shares. TB-13 maps `EventId` 1:1 to `TaskId` (the event
  1076	/// being resolved is "this task got finalized YES via FinalizeRewardTx
  1077	/// vs. died NO via TaskBankruptcyTx"); future TB-14+ may decouple to
  1078	/// per-node events.
  1079	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
  1080	pub struct EventId(pub TaskId);
  1081	
  1082	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): outcome-side discriminator
  1083	/// for conditional shares. Yes = "this event was finalized YES";
  1084	/// No = "this event went bankrupt / was rejected".
  1085	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash, Serialize, Deserialize)]
  1086	#[repr(u8)]
  1087	pub enum OutcomeSide {
  1088	    Yes = 0,
  1089	    No = 1,
  1090	}
  1091	
  1092	impl Default for OutcomeSide {
  1093	    fn default() -> Self {
  1094	        Self::Yes
  1095	    }
  1096	}
  1097	
  1098	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): non-negative share count.
  1099	///
  1100	/// Architect spec uses `units: i128`; we tighten to `u128` because TB-13
  1101	/// shares can never be negative (mint creates positive, redeem decreases
  1102	/// positive, no debt model). Underflow at redeem time is a sequencer
  1103	/// `RedeemMoreThanOwned` rejection, not a representation concern.
  1104	#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, PartialOrd, Ord, Hash, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
  1105	pub struct ShareAmount {
  1106	    pub units: u128,
  1107	}
  1108	
  1109	impl ShareAmount {
  1110	    /// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): zero share amount —
  1111	    /// default constructor for empty share balance lookups.
  1112	    pub const fn zero() -> Self {
  1113	        Self { units: 0 }
  1114	    }
  1115	    /// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): build a `ShareAmount`
  1116	    /// from a raw `u128` units count. Used by sequencer mint/redeem arms
  1117	    /// (Atom 2) to project `MicroCoin::micro_units() as u128` into the
  1118	    /// share-claim domain.
  1119	    pub const fn from_units(units: u128) -> Self {
  1120	        Self { units }
  1121	    }
  1122	}
  1123	
  1124	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3 + FR-13.1..3): mint conditional
  1125	/// shares against locked Coin collateral.
  1126	///
  1127	/// Sequencer arm (Atom 2):
  1128	/// 1. `balances_t[owner] >= amount` else `InsufficientBalanceForMint`.
  1129	/// 2. `balances_t[owner] -= amount`.
  1130	/// 3. `conditional_collateral_t[event_id] += amount`.
  1131	/// 4. `conditional_share_balances_t[(owner, event_id, Yes)] += amount.units`.
  1132	/// 5. `conditional_share_balances_t[(owner, event_id, No)]  += amount.units`.
  1133	///
  1134	/// CTF preserved: balance debit equals collateral credit; YES/NO shares
  1135	/// are claims (not Coin) per CR-13.3 / SG-13.2.
  1136	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
  1137	pub struct CompleteSetMintTx {
  1138	    pub tx_id: TxId,                          //  1
  1139	    pub parent_state_root: Hash,              //  2
  1140	    pub event_id: EventId,                    //  3
  1141	    pub owner: AgentId,                       //  4
  1142	    pub amount: MicroCoin,                    //  5
  1143	    pub signature: AgentSignature,            //  6
  1144	    pub timestamp_logical: u64,               //  7
  1145	}
  1146	
  1147	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3 + FR-13.4..5 + SG-13.5..6):
  1148	/// redeem winning conditional shares post-resolution.
  1149	///
  1150	/// **Resolution authority is the live `task_markets_t[event_id.0].state`**
  1151	/// (Finalized → Yes wins; Bankrupt → No wins). The redeem carries no
  1152	/// resolution-ref wrapper — `outcome` IS the claim and the sequencer
  1153	/// reconciles it against state.
  1154	///
  1155	/// Sequencer arm (Atom 2):
  1156	/// 1. Look up `task_markets_t[event_id.0].state`:
  1157	///    - If `Finalized`: `outcome` must be `Yes` else `InvalidResolutionRef`.
  1158	///    - If `Bankrupt`:  `outcome` must be `No`  else `InvalidResolutionRef`.
  1159	///    - If `Open` or `Expired`: `RedeemBeforeResolution`.
  1160	///    - If absent: `RedeemBeforeResolution`.
  1161	/// 2. `conditional_share_balances_t[(owner, event_id, outcome)] >= share_amount.units`
  1162	///    else `RedeemMoreThanOwned`.
  1163	/// 3. `conditional_collateral_t[event_id] >= share_amount.units` else
  1164	///    `InsufficientCollateral` (defensive; should never fire if
  1165	///    `assert_complete_set_balanced` holds).
  1166	/// 4. Debit shares; debit collateral; credit `balances_t[owner]` 1:1.
  1167	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
  1168	pub struct CompleteSetRedeemTx {
  1169	    pub tx_id: TxId,                          //  1
  1170	    pub parent_state_root: Hash,              //  2
  1171	    pub event_id: EventId,                    //  3
  1172	    pub owner: AgentId,                       //  4
  1173	    pub outcome: OutcomeSide,                 //  5
  1174	    pub share_amount: ShareAmount,            //  6
  1175	    pub signature: AgentSignature,            //  7
  1176	    pub timestamp_logical: u64,               //  8
  1177	}
  1178	
  1179	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3 + FR-13.6..7): explicit
  1180	/// provider-funded protocol-owned share inventory seed. **NO trading,
  1181	/// NO quoting, NO pricing.**
  1182	///
  1183	/// Sequencer arm (Atom 2):
  1184	/// 1. `collateral_amount > 0` else `InsufficientCollateral` (SG-13.4).
  1185	/// 2. `balances_t[provider] >= collateral_amount` else
  1186	///    `InsufficientBalanceForMint` (SG-13.3).
  1187	/// 3. `balances_t[provider] -= collateral_amount`.
  1188	/// 4. `conditional_collateral_t[event_id] += collateral_amount`.
  1189	/// 5. Provider receives BOTH sides of share inventory:
  1190	///    `conditional_share_balances_t[(provider, event_id, Yes)] += collateral_amount.units`
  1191	///    `conditional_share_balances_t[(provider, event_id, No)]  += collateral_amount.units`.
  1192	///
  1193	/// The shape is identical to `CompleteSetMintTx` post-effect; the
  1194	/// distinction is semantic ("mint" = claim against own bet vs "seed" =
  1195	/// protocol-owned inventory pre-resolution). Future tracer-bullets may
  1196	/// treat seeded liquidity differently — TB-13 itself records only the
  1197	/// fact of seeding, not any signal derived from it.
  1198	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
  1199	pub struct MarketSeedTx {
  1200	    pub tx_id: TxId,                          //  1
  1201	    pub parent_state_root: Hash,              //  2
  1202	    pub event_id: EventId,                    //  3
  1203	    pub provider: AgentId,                    //  4
  1204	    pub collateral_amount: MicroCoin,         //  5
  1205	    pub signature: AgentSignature,            //  6
  1206	    pub timestamp_logical: u64,               //  7
  1207	}
  1208	
  1209	// ── TB-13 SigningPayloads ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  1210	
  1211	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): signing payload for
  1212	/// `CompleteSetMintTx` (7 fields → 6 fields; signature excluded).
  1213	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
  1214	pub struct CompleteSetMintSigningPayload {
  1215	    pub tx_id: TxId,
  1216	    pub parent_state_root: Hash,
  1217	    pub event_id: EventId,
  1218	    pub owner: AgentId,
  1219	    pub amount: MicroCoin,
  1220	    pub timestamp_logical: u64,
  1221	}
  1222	
  1223	impl CompleteSetMintSigningPayload {
  1224	    /// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): domain-prefixed
  1225	    /// canonical digest for agent-signed CompleteSetMintTx. Domain
  1226	    /// prefix `b"turingosv4.agent_sig.complete_set_mint.v1"` mirrors
  1227	    /// agent-domain naming (Work / Verify / Challenge / TaskOpen /
  1228	    /// EscrowLock).
  1229	    pub fn canonical_digest(&self) -> [u8; 32] {
  1230	        domain_prefixed_digest(DOMAIN_AGENT_COMPLETE_SET_MINT, self)
  1231	    }
  1232	}
  1233	
  1234	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): signing payload for
  1235	/// `CompleteSetRedeemTx` (8 fields → 7 fields; signature excluded).
  1236	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
  1237	pub struct CompleteSetRedeemSigningPayload {
  1238	    pub tx_id: TxId,
  1239	    pub parent_state_root: Hash,
  1240	    pub event_id: EventId,
  1241	    pub owner: AgentId,
  1242	    pub outcome: OutcomeSide,
  1243	    pub share_amount: ShareAmount,
  1244	    pub timestamp_logical: u64,
  1245	}
  1246

  1248	    /// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): domain-prefixed
  1249	    /// canonical digest for agent-signed CompleteSetRedeemTx. Domain
  1250	    /// prefix `b"turingosv4.agent_sig.complete_set_redeem.v1"`.
  1251	    pub fn canonical_digest(&self) -> [u8; 32] {
  1252	        domain_prefixed_digest(DOMAIN_AGENT_COMPLETE_SET_REDEEM, self)
  1253	    }
  1254	}
  1255	
  1256	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): signing payload for
  1257	/// `MarketSeedTx` (7 fields → 6 fields; signature excluded).
  1258	#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize, Default)]
  1259	pub struct MarketSeedSigningPayload {
  1260	    pub tx_id: TxId,
  1261	    pub parent_state_root: Hash,
  1262	    pub event_id: EventId,
  1263	    pub provider: AgentId,
  1264	    pub collateral_amount: MicroCoin,
  1265	    pub timestamp_logical: u64,
  1266	}
  1267	
  1268	impl MarketSeedSigningPayload {
  1269	    /// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3): domain-prefixed
  1270	    /// canonical digest for agent-signed MarketSeedTx. Domain prefix
  1271	    /// `b"turingosv4.agent_sig.market_seed.v1"`.

  1513	impl TypedTx {
  1514	    /// Project to the [`TxKind`] discriminator stored in `LedgerEntry.tx_kind`.
  1515	    pub fn tx_kind(&self) -> crate::bottom_white::ledger::transition_ledger::TxKind {
  1516	        use crate::bottom_white::ledger::transition_ledger::TxKind;
  1517	        match self {
  1518	            Self::Work(_) => TxKind::Work,
  1519	            Self::Verify(_) => TxKind::Verify,
  1520	            Self::Challenge(_) => TxKind::Challenge,
  1521	            Self::Reuse(_) => TxKind::Reuse,
  1522	            Self::FinalizeReward(_) => TxKind::FinalizeReward,
  1523	            Self::TaskExpire(_) => TxKind::TaskExpire,
  1524	            Self::TerminalSummary(_) => TxKind::TerminalSummary,
  1525	            Self::TaskOpen(_) => TxKind::TaskOpen,
  1526	            Self::EscrowLock(_) => TxKind::EscrowLock,
  1527	            Self::ChallengeResolve(_) => TxKind::ChallengeResolve,
  1528	            Self::TaskBankruptcy(_) => TxKind::TaskBankruptcy,
  1529	            Self::CompleteSetMint(_) => TxKind::CompleteSetMint,
  1530	            Self::CompleteSetRedeem(_) => TxKind::CompleteSetRedeem,
  1531	            Self::MarketSeed(_) => TxKind::MarketSeed,
  1532	        }
  1533	    }
  1534	}

  1613	// TB-13 — agent-signed conditional-share variants. Submitter is the
  1614	// owner / provider on the wire (mirrors WorkTx → agent_id pattern).
  1615	
  1616	impl HasSubmitter for CompleteSetMintTx {
  1617	    fn submitter_id(&self) -> Option<AgentId> {
  1618	        Some(self.owner.clone())
  1619	    }
  1620	}
  1621	
  1622	impl HasSubmitter for CompleteSetRedeemTx {

  1625	    }
  1626	}
  1627	
  1628	impl HasSubmitter for MarketSeedTx {

  1634	impl HasSubmitter for TypedTx {
  1830	    /// TB-5 Atom 5 (charter v2 § 4.6 + preflight § 7.2): the targeted
  1831	    /// `ChallengeCase` is already in a non-Open state (Released or
  1832	    /// UpheldDeferred). Idempotency gate — re-resolution of the same
  1833	    /// case is rejected. Maps to `L4ERejectionClass::PolicyViolation`.
  1834	    AlreadyResolved,
  1835	
  1836	    // ── TB-13 Atom 2 (architect 2026-05-03 ruling Part A §4.4 FR-13.1..7) ──
  1837	    /// `CompleteSetMintTx` admission: `balances_t[owner] < amount`.
  1838	    /// Distinct from `InsufficientBalance` to give Information Loom a
  1839	    /// per-tx-class discriminator. Maps to `L4ERejectionClass::InsufficientBalance`.
  1840	    InsufficientBalanceForMint,
  1841	    /// `CompleteSetRedeemTx` admission: the referenced event is in
  1842	    /// `task_markets_t[event_id.0]` but its state is `Open` or `Expired`
  1843	    /// (i.e., neither `Finalized` for YES nor `Bankrupt` for NO). Architect
  1844	    /// FR-13.4 + SG-13.5: redeem unavailable before outcome resolution.
  1845	    /// Maps to `L4ERejectionClass::PolicyViolation`.
  1846	    RedeemBeforeResolution,
  1847	    /// `CompleteSetRedeemTx` admission: the owner's
  1848	    /// `conditional_share_balances_t[owner][event_id].{yes|no}` is less
  1849	    /// than the requested `share_amount.units`. Cannot redeem more than
  1850	    /// owned. Maps to `L4ERejectionClass::PolicyViolation`.
  1851	    RedeemMoreThanOwned,
  1852	    /// `MarketSeedTx` admission: `collateral_amount.micro_units() == 0`.
  1853	    /// Architect SG-13.4: market seed cannot create liquidity without
  1854	    /// collateral. Also fired defensively at `CompleteSetRedeemTx` time
  1855	    /// if `conditional_collateral_t[event_id]` lacks the redeemed amount
  1856	    /// (should never happen if `assert_complete_set_balanced` holds).
  1857	    /// Maps to `L4ERejectionClass::PolicyViolation`.
  1858	    InsufficientCollateral,
  1859	    /// `CompleteSetRedeemTx` admission: the redeem's `outcome` does not
  1860	    /// match the `task_markets_t[event_id.0]` state (e.g., outcome=Yes
  1861	    /// but state=Bankrupt, or outcome=No but state=Finalized). Architect
  1862	    /// §4.3 + FR-13.5: after-YES pays YES not NO. Maps to
  1863	    /// `L4ERejectionClass::PolicyViolation`.
  1864	    InvalidResolutionRef,
  1865	    /// TB-13 Atom 6 round-2 (Gemini CHALLENGE Q13 remediation 2026-05-03):
  1866	    /// `CompleteSetMintTx` / `MarketSeedTx` admission rejected because
  1867	    /// the target event's `task_markets_t[event_id.0].state` is not
  1868	    /// `Open` (Finalized / Bankrupt / Expired). Closes a griefing
  1869	    /// surface where an agent could mint shares against a closed
  1870	    /// event and immediately redeem winning side for full refund,
  1871	    /// leaving noise + stranded shares on-chain. Maps to
  1872	    /// `L4ERejectionClass::PolicyViolation`.
  1873	    EventNotOpen,
  1874	
  1875	    // ── Stub sentinel (CO1.7.5 fills) ──────────────────────────────────────
  1876	    /// Stub return value used by CO1.7.5 unimplemented bodies — preserves
  1877	    /// sequencer + dispatch correctness without forcing transition logic
  1878	    /// into this atom. Audit input: this is intentional, not a code smell.
  1879	    NotYetImplemented,
  1880	}
  1881	
  1882	impl std::fmt::Display for TransitionError {
  1883	    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> std::fmt::Result {
  1884	        match self {
  1885	            Self::StaleParent => write!(f, "stale parent_state_root"),
  1886	            Self::SignatureInvalid => write!(f, "agent signature invalid"),
  1887	            Self::InvalidSystemSignature => write!(f, "invalid system signature"),
  1888	            Self::StakeInsufficient => write!(f, "stake / bond insufficient"),
  1889	            Self::TargetWorkTxNotFound => write!(f, "target work_tx not found"),
  1890	            Self::TargetWorkTxNotVerifiable => write!(f, "target work_tx not in a verifiable state"),
  1891	            Self::ParentNotAcceptedYet => write!(f, "parent work_tx not yet accepted"),
  1892	            Self::AcceptancePredicateFailed(p) => write!(f, "acceptance predicate failed: {p:?}"),
  1893	            Self::VerificationPredicateFailed(p) => write!(f, "verification predicate failed: {p:?}"),
  1894	            Self::SettlementPredicateFailed(p) => write!(f, "settlement predicate failed: {p:?}"),
  1895	            Self::ChallengeWindowClosed => write!(f, "challenge window closed"),
  1896	            Self::ChallengeWindowStillOpen => write!(f, "challenge window still open"),
  1897	            Self::AlreadySlashed => write!(f, "already slashed"),
  1898	            Self::CounterexampleInsufficient => write!(f, "counterexample insufficient"),
  1899	            Self::ToolNotInRegistry => write!(f, "reuse tool not in registry"),
  1900	            Self::ToolCreatorMismatch => write!(f, "reuse tool creator mismatch"),
  1901	            Self::ClaimNotFound => write!(f, "claim not found"),
  1902	            Self::ClaimAlreadyFinalized => write!(
  1903	                f,
  1904	                "claim already finalized (idempotent re-finalize rejected)"
  1905	            ),
  1906	            Self::TaskNotFound => write!(f, "task not found"),
  1907	            Self::TaskNotExpired => write!(f, "task deadline not yet reached"),
  1908	            Self::TaskHasOpenClaim => write!(f, "task has at least one open claim"),
  1909	            Self::TerminalSummaryNotApplicable => write!(f, "terminal summary not applicable"),
  1910	            Self::EscrowMissing => write!(f, "escrow / task-market entry missing for task_id"),
  1911	            Self::MonetaryInvariantViolation => write!(f, "monetary invariant violation (post-init mint or ctf-conservation break)"),
  1912	            Self::TaskAlreadyOpen => write!(f, "task market already open for task_id"),
  1913	            Self::TaskNotOpen => write!(f, "no open task market for task_id"),
  1914	            Self::InsufficientBalance => write!(f, "balance below required debit amount"),
  1915	            Self::BondInsufficient => write!(f, "verifier bond insufficient"),
  1916	            Self::TargetWorkInactive => write!(f, "target work_tx not in stakes_t (never accepted live, or already resolved)"),
  1917	            Self::EmptyCounterexample => write!(f, "challenge counterexample_cid is empty / zero"),

  3100	    // MarketSeed (architect 2026-05-03 post-TB-12 ruling Part A §4.3).
  3101	    // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  3102	
  3103	    fn fixture_complete_set_mint_tx() -> CompleteSetMintTx {
  3104	        CompleteSetMintTx {
  3105	            tx_id: TxId("complete-set-mint-fixture-01".into()),
  3106	            parent_state_root: h(0x77),
  3107	            event_id: EventId(TaskId("task-fixture-tb13-mint".into())),
  3108	            owner: AgentId("agent-mint-fixture".into()),
  3109	            amount: MicroCoin::from_micro_units(7_000_000),
  3110	            signature: AgentSignature::from_bytes([0xddu8; 64]),
  3111	            timestamp_logical: 21,
  3112	        }
  3113	    }
  3114	
  3115	    fn fixture_complete_set_redeem_tx() -> CompleteSetRedeemTx {
  3116	        CompleteSetRedeemTx {
  3117	            tx_id: TxId("complete-set-redeem-fixture-01".into()),
  3118	            parent_state_root: h(0x88),
  3119	            event_id: EventId(TaskId("task-fixture-tb13-redeem".into())),
  3120	            owner: AgentId("agent-redeem-fixture".into()),
  3121	            outcome: OutcomeSide::Yes,
  3122	            share_amount: ShareAmount::from_units(7_000_000),
  3123	            signature: AgentSignature::from_bytes([0xeeu8; 64]),
  3124	            timestamp_logical: 22,
  3125	        }
  3126	    }
  3127	
  3128	    fn fixture_market_seed_tx() -> MarketSeedTx {
  3129	        MarketSeedTx {
  3130	            tx_id: TxId("market-seed-fixture-01".into()),
  3131	            parent_state_root: h(0x99),
  3132	            event_id: EventId(TaskId("task-fixture-tb13-seed".into())),
  3133	            provider: AgentId("agent-provider-fixture".into()),
  3134	            collateral_amount: MicroCoin::from_micro_units(2_500_000),
  3135	            signature: AgentSignature::from_bytes([0xffu8; 64]),
  3136	            timestamp_logical: 23,
  3137	        }
  3138	    }
  3139	
  3140	    /// TB-13 U1: CompleteSetMintTx round-trips through canonical encode.
  3141	    #[test]
  3142	    fn tb_13_complete_set_mint_round_trips_canonical() {
  3143	        let tx = TypedTx::CompleteSetMint(fixture_complete_set_mint_tx());
  3144	        let bytes = canonical_encode(&tx).expect("encode");
  3145	        let decoded: TypedTx = canonical_decode(&bytes).expect("decode");
  3146	        assert_eq!(tx, decoded, "CompleteSetMintTx round-trip mismatch");
  3147	        assert_eq!(
  3148	            decoded.tx_kind(),
  3149	            crate::bottom_white::ledger::transition_ledger::TxKind::CompleteSetMint,
  3150	        );
  3151	    }
  3152	
  3153	    /// TB-13 U2: CompleteSetRedeemTx round-trips through canonical encode.
  3154	    #[test]
  3155	    fn tb_13_complete_set_redeem_round_trips_canonical() {
  3156	        let tx = TypedTx::CompleteSetRedeem(fixture_complete_set_redeem_tx());
  3157	        let bytes = canonical_encode(&tx).expect("encode");
  3158	        let decoded: TypedTx = canonical_decode(&bytes).expect("decode");
  3159	        assert_eq!(tx, decoded, "CompleteSetRedeemTx round-trip mismatch");
  3160	        assert_eq!(
  3161	            decoded.tx_kind(),
  3162	            crate::bottom_white::ledger::transition_ledger::TxKind::CompleteSetRedeem,
  3163	        );
  3164	    }
  3165	
  3166	    /// TB-13 U3: MarketSeedTx round-trips through canonical encode.
  3167	    #[test]
  3168	    fn tb_13_market_seed_round_trips_canonical() {
  3169	        let tx = TypedTx::MarketSeed(fixture_market_seed_tx());
  3170	        let bytes = canonical_encode(&tx).expect("encode");
  3171	        let decoded: TypedTx = canonical_decode(&bytes).expect("decode");
  3172	        assert_eq!(tx, decoded, "MarketSeedTx round-trip mismatch");
  3173	        assert_eq!(
  3174	            decoded.tx_kind(),
  3175	            crate::bottom_white::ledger::transition_ledger::TxKind::MarketSeed,
  3176	        );
  3177	    }
  3178	
  3179	    /// TB-13 U4: OutcomeSide repr discriminants stable.
  3180	    #[test]
  3181	    fn tb_13_outcome_side_repr_u8_stable() {
  3182	        assert_eq!(OutcomeSide::Yes as u8, 0);
  3183	        assert_eq!(OutcomeSide::No as u8, 1);
  3184	    }
  3185	
  3186	    /// TB-13 U5: ShareAmount default is zero.
  3187	    #[test]
  3188	    fn tb_13_share_amount_default_zero_units() {
  3189	        assert_eq!(ShareAmount::default(), ShareAmount::zero());
  3190	        assert_eq!(ShareAmount::default().units, 0u128);
  3191	    }
  3192	
  3193	    /// TB-13 U6: deterministic canonical_digest — same payload twice yields
  3194	    /// the same digest. Architect §4.3 requires deterministic signing
  3195	    /// payloads (no environmental input).
  3196	    #[test]
  3197	    fn tb_13_signing_payloads_deterministic_digest() {
  3198	        let mint_a = fixture_complete_set_mint_tx().to_signing_payload().canonical_digest();
  3199	        let mint_b = fixture_complete_set_mint_tx().to_signing_payload().canonical_digest();
  3200	        assert_eq!(mint_a, mint_b, "CompleteSetMint digest must be deterministic");
  3201	
  3202	        let redeem_a = fixture_complete_set_redeem_tx().to_signing_payload().canonical_digest();
  3203	        let redeem_b = fixture_complete_set_redeem_tx().to_signing_payload().canonical_digest();
  3204	        assert_eq!(redeem_a, redeem_b, "CompleteSetRedeem digest must be deterministic");
  3205	
  3206	        let seed_a = fixture_market_seed_tx().to_signing_payload().canonical_digest();
  3207	        let seed_b = fixture_market_seed_tx().to_signing_payload().canonical_digest();
  3208	        assert_eq!(seed_a, seed_b, "MarketSeed digest must be deterministic");
  3209	    }
  3210	
  3211	    /// TB-13 U7: signing payloads exclude the `signature` field — exact
  3212	    /// field count enforced (mint 6 / redeem 7 / seed 6).
  3213	    #[test]
  3214	    fn tb_13_signing_payloads_exclude_signature_field_counts() {
  3215	        let mint_p = fixture_complete_set_mint_tx().to_signing_payload();
  3216	        let mint_v = serde_json::to_value(&mint_p).unwrap();
  3217	        let mint_o = mint_v.as_object().unwrap();
  3218	        assert_eq!(mint_o.len(), 6, "CompleteSetMintSigningPayload must have 6 fields");
  3219	        assert!(!mint_o.contains_key("signature"));
  3220	
  3221	        let redeem_p = fixture_complete_set_redeem_tx().to_signing_payload();
  3222	        let redeem_v = serde_json::to_value(&redeem_p).unwrap();
  3223	        let redeem_o = redeem_v.as_object().unwrap();
  3224	        assert_eq!(redeem_o.len(), 7, "CompleteSetRedeemSigningPayload must have 7 fields");
  3225	        assert!(!redeem_o.contains_key("signature"));
  3226	
  3227	        let seed_p = fixture_market_seed_tx().to_signing_payload();
  3228	        let seed_v = serde_json::to_value(&seed_p).unwrap();
  3229	        let seed_o = seed_v.as_object().unwrap();
  3230	        assert_eq!(seed_o.len(), 6, "MarketSeedSigningPayload must have 6 fields");
  3231	        assert!(!seed_o.contains_key("signature"));
  3232	    }

   242	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-11 Atom 2: state-root mutator on `TaskBankruptcyTx`
   243	/// accept (mutates task_markets_t[task_id].state = Bankrupt + sets
   244	/// bankruptcy_at_logical_t; no money movement).
   245	pub fn task_bankruptcy_accept_state_root(prev: &Hash, tx: &TypedTx) -> Hash {
   246	    let mut h = Sha256::new();
   247	    h.update(TASK_BANKRUPTCY_DOMAIN_V1);
   248	    h.update(prev.0);
   249	    h.update(canonical_encode(tx).expect("TypedTx is canonical-encodable"));
   250	    let digest: [u8; 32] = h.finalize().into();
   251	    Hash::from_bytes(digest)
   252	}

  1924	
  1925	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1926	// CO1.7-extra D2: advance_head_t — post-commit head_t close (Art 0.4)
  1927	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1928	
  1929	/// TRACE_MATRIX § 5 — L4 sequencer post-commit head_t wiring (Art 0.4).
  1930	///
  2428	            | TypedTx::TaskExpire(_)
  2429	            | TypedTx::TerminalSummary(_)
  2430	            | TypedTx::ChallengeResolve(_)
  2431	            // TB-11 Atom 1 (architect §6.2 ruling 2026-05-02): TaskBankruptcyTx
  2432	            // is system-emitted only; agent ingress must reject pre-queue per
  2433	            // Anti-Oreo (Art V.1.3). Construction goes through emit_system_tx.
  2434	            | TypedTx::TaskBankruptcy(_) => {
  2435	                return Err(SubmitError::SystemTxForbiddenOnAgentIngress);
  2436	            }
  2437	            // Agent-submitted variants — proceed to queue. TB-13 conditional-
  2438	            // share variants (CompleteSetMint / CompleteSetRedeem / MarketSeed)
  2439	            // are agent-signed and admit through the same ingress path.
  2440	            TypedTx::Work(_)
  2441	            | TypedTx::Verify(_)
  2442	            | TypedTx::Challenge(_)
  2443	            | TypedTx::Reuse(_)
  2444	            | TypedTx::TaskOpen(_)
  2445	            | TypedTx::EscrowLock(_)
  2446	            | TypedTx::CompleteSetMint(_)
  2447	            | TypedTx::CompleteSetRedeem(_)
  2448	            | TypedTx::MarketSeed(_) => {}
  2449	        }
  2450	        // TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 6 round-3 (Codex VETO TB13-AUTH 2026-05-03):
  2451	        // submit-time agent-signature verification for the 3 TB-13
  2452	        // conditional-share variants. Opt-in via `set_agent_pubkeys` —
  2453	        // when the manifest is set, forged or unregistered signatures
  2454	        // are rejected pre-queue with `SubmitError::AgentSignatureInvalid`.
  2455	        // When the manifest is absent (default), this gate is bypassed
  2456	        // and replay-time `verify.rs` Gate 4 is the only line of defense
  2457	        // (see OBS_AGENT_SIG_REPLAY_GAP_2026-05-03.md).
  2458	        if let Some(manifest) = self.agent_pubkeys.get() {
  2459	            use crate::runtime::agent_keypairs::verify_agent_signature;
  2460	            match &tx {
  2461	                TypedTx::CompleteSetMint(mint) => {
  2462	                    let pubkey = manifest
  2463	                        .get(&mint.owner)
  2464	                        .ok_or(SubmitError::AgentSignatureInvalid)?;
  2465	                    let digest = mint.to_signing_payload().canonical_digest();
  2466	                    if verify_agent_signature(&mint.signature, &digest, &pubkey).is_err() {
  2467	                        return Err(SubmitError::AgentSignatureInvalid);
  2468	                    }
  2469	                }
  2470	                TypedTx::CompleteSetRedeem(redeem) => {
  2471	                    let pubkey = manifest
  2472	                        .get(&redeem.owner)
  2473	                        .ok_or(SubmitError::AgentSignatureInvalid)?;
  2474	                    let digest = redeem.to_signing_payload().canonical_digest();
  2475	                    if verify_agent_signature(&redeem.signature, &digest, &pubkey).is_err() {
  2476	                        return Err(SubmitError::AgentSignatureInvalid);
  2477	                    }
  2478	                }
  2479	                TypedTx::MarketSeed(seed) => {
  2480	                    let pubkey = manifest
  2481	                        .get(&seed.provider)
  2482	                        .ok_or(SubmitError::AgentSignatureInvalid)?;
  2483	                    let digest = seed.to_signing_payload().canonical_digest();
  2484	                    if verify_agent_signature(&seed.signature, &digest, &pubkey).is_err() {
  2485	                        return Err(SubmitError::AgentSignatureInvalid);
  2486	                    }
  2487	                }
  2488	                // Other agent variants are not gated here — codebase-wide
  2489	                // forward-dep per OBS_AGENT_SIG_REPLAY_GAP.
  2490	                _ => {}

   304	
   305	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   306	// assert_no_post_init_mint — structural guard at the tx layer
   307	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   308	
   309	/// TRACE_MATRIX P3:1 (kill 1) — structural guard against post-genesis mint
   310	/// at the `TypedTx` layer.
   311	///
   312	/// **Today, K5 has no `Mint` variant** — none of the 7 `TypedTx` variants
   313	/// directly inject coins. Genesis allocation happens in `on_init` outside
   314	/// the K5 transition surface. Therefore, on a non-genesis `q`, this fn
   315	/// returns `Ok(())` for every well-formed `TypedTx`.
   316	///
   317	/// **Why the function exists anyway**: it is a forward-compat barrier.
   318	/// If a future RSP atom adds a `Mint` (or `SystemReward`-class) variant,
   319	/// it MUST be added to the match below AND rejected here when
   320	/// `q.state_root_t != Hash::ZERO`. Numeric conservation is enforced by
   321	/// [`assert_total_ctf_conserved`] separately.
   322	pub fn assert_no_post_init_mint(tx: &TypedTx, q: &QState) -> Result<(), MonetaryError> {
   323	    let is_post_init = q.state_root_t != Hash::ZERO;
   324	    if !is_post_init {
   325	        return Ok(());
   326	    }
   327	    match tx {
   328	        TypedTx::Work(_)
   329	        | TypedTx::Verify(_)
   330	        | TypedTx::Challenge(_)
   331	        | TypedTx::Reuse(_)
   332	        | TypedTx::FinalizeReward(_)
   333	        | TypedTx::TaskExpire(_)
   334	        | TypedTx::TerminalSummary(_)
   335	        // TB-3 RSP-1: TaskOpen + EscrowLock are TRANSFERS (or metadata-only),
   336	        // never mints — their dispatch arms (Atoms 4-5) maintain CTF
   337	        // conservation via assert_total_ctf_conserved with empty exempt list.
   338	        | TypedTx::TaskOpen(_)
   339	        | TypedTx::EscrowLock(_)
   340	        // TB-5 RSP-3.0/3.1: ChallengeResolve is system-emitted resolution.
   341	        // Released path is a TRANSFER (challenger bond → balances; CTF
   342	        // round-trip closes; charter v2 § 4.6). UpheldDeferred is a marker
   343	        // only (no economic mutation; charter v2 § 4.7). Neither mints —
   344	        // CTF conservation enforced by assert_total_ctf_conserved with
   345	        // empty exempt list at the dispatch site.
   346	        | TypedTx::ChallengeResolve(_)
   347	        // TB-11 (architect §6.2 ruling 2026-05-02): TaskBankruptcy is a
   348	        // task-level state mutation only (task_markets_t[task_id].state →
   349	        // Bankrupt). No money movement, so trivially does not mint.
   350	        // CTF conservation enforced by assert_total_ctf_conserved with
   351	        // empty exempt list at the dispatch site.
   352	        | TypedTx::TaskBankruptcy(_)
   353	        // TB-13 (architect 2026-05-03 post-TB-12 ruling Part A §4.3 +
   354	        // CR-13.1..6): CompleteSetMint / CompleteSetRedeem / MarketSeed
   355	        // are balance ↔ collateral migrations only. Mint debits balance
   356	        // and credits collateral 1:1; redeem debits collateral and shares
   357	        // and credits balance 1:1; seed debits provider balance and
   358	        // credits collateral 1:1. Conditional shares are claims, NOT Coin
   359	        // (CR-13.3 + SG-13.2). No mint, no burn — Atom 3 extends
   360	        // assert_total_ctf_conserved with conditional_collateral_t as the
   361	        // 6th Coin holding.
   362	        | TypedTx::CompleteSetMint(_)
   363	        | TypedTx::CompleteSetRedeem(_)
   364	        | TypedTx::MarketSeed(_) => Ok(()),
   365	    }
   366	}
   367	
   368	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   369	// assert_total_ctf_conserved — numeric conservation across a transition
   370	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   371	
   372	/// TRACE_MATRIX 基本法 1 + P3:1 — conservation of total CTF across a
   373	/// transition `before → after`.
   374	///
   375	/// Mints (`delta > 0`) and burns (`delta < 0`) are both rejected unless
   376	/// `exempt_tx_kinds` is non-empty. The exempt list is the explicit opt-out
   377	/// for legitimate supply-changing operations (e.g., genesis init,
   378	/// system-emitted rewards in a future RSP); RSP-0 never populates it
   379	/// at runtime.
   380	///
   381	/// Caller convention: pass `&[]` for normal agent-submitted transitions.
   382	/// Pass `&[TxKind::FinalizeReward]` (etc.) only when a system-emitted
   383	/// supply-changing tx is being processed AND the RSP semantics for that
   384	/// kind have been ratified. RSP-0 does not ratify any.
   385	pub fn assert_total_ctf_conserved(
   386	    before: &EconomicState,
   387	    after: &EconomicState,
   388	    exempt_tx_kinds: &[TxKind],
   389	) -> Result<(), MonetaryError> {

   481	            } else {
   482	                (OutcomeSide::No, sum_no)
   483	            };

   485	                event_id_hex: hex_event_id(event_id),
   486	                side,
   487	                share_sum_units,
   488	                collateral_units,
   489	            });
   490	        }
   491	    }
   492	    Ok(())
   493	}
   494	
   495	fn hex_event_id(event_id: &crate::state::typed_tx::EventId) -> String {
   496	    event_id.0 .0.clone()
   497	}

   385	pub fn assert_total_ctf_conserved(
   386	    before: &EconomicState,

   388	    exempt_tx_kinds: &[TxKind],
   389	) -> Result<(), MonetaryError> {

   407	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   408	// assert_read_is_free — tx-level no-fee guard
   409	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   410	
   411	/// TRACE_MATRIX P3:2 — assert that no K5 `TxKind` carries a per-tx fee.
   412	///
   413	/// K5 spec: every `TypedTx` variant has stake / bond fields (locked but
   414	/// not consumed) but NO fee field. A non-zero `fee` is a structural bug
   415	/// in whichever caller computed it; this fn is the barrier.
   416	///
   417	/// Note: tool-level read-is-free for `rtool` / `search` / `think` is
   418	/// enforced at the SDK boundary in a later RSP atom (out of scope for
   419	/// RSP-0). This fn covers the tx-level invariant only.
   420	pub fn assert_read_is_free(tx_kind: TxKind, fee: u64) -> Result<(), MonetaryError> {
   421	    if fee != 0 {
   422	        return Err(MonetaryError::ReadCharged { tx_kind, fee });
   423	    }
   424	    Ok(())
   425	}

   427	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   428	// TB-13 Atom 3 — assert_complete_set_balanced (architect 2026-05-03 post-
   429	// TB-12 ruling Part A §4.4 SG-13.1 + §4.5 CR-13.3..4)
   430	// ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   431	
   432	/// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 3 (architect §4.3 + SG-13.1): the
   433	/// **complete-set balanced** invariant.
   434	///
   435	/// For every event in `conditional_collateral_t`:
   436	///
   437	/// ```text
   438	/// min(Σ_{owner} share[(owner, event, Yes)], Σ_{owner} share[(owner, event, No)])
   439	///   == collateral[event].micro_units()
   440	/// ```
   441	///
   442	/// Why MIN, not equality on both sides:
   443	/// - Pre-resolution (mint + seed only): both sides equal collateral, so
   444	///   `min == collateral` is trivially equivalent to `Yes == No == collateral`.
   445	/// - Post-resolution + partial redeem: the winning side decreases by the
   446	///   redeemed amount AND collateral decreases by the same amount; the
   447	///   losing side stays the same (its shares are stranded zero-value
   448	///   claims). So `winning_side == collateral` still holds, while
   449	///   `losing_side > collateral` (losing side has surplus). MIN picks
   450	///   the winning side and matches collateral.
   451	/// - Post-resolution + full redeem: winning side is 0, collateral is 0,
   452	///   losing side is the original mint amount. MIN(0, original) = 0 = collateral.
   453	///
   454	/// This is the mathematical core of "1 Coin = 1 YES_E + 1 NO_E" enforced
   455	/// at the QState level: every Coin in collateral can be redeemed by the
   456	/// winning side, and no winning-side share is unbacked.
   457	pub fn assert_complete_set_balanced(
   458	    s: &EconomicState,
   459	) -> Result<(), MonetaryError> {
   460	    use crate::state::typed_tx::OutcomeSide;
   461	    for (event_id, collateral) in s.conditional_collateral_t.0.iter() {
   462	        let collateral_units: u128 = collateral.micro_units() as u128;
   463	        let mut sum_yes: u128 = 0;
   464	        let mut sum_no: u128 = 0;
   465	        for owner_map in s.conditional_share_balances_t.0.values() {
   466	            if let Some(pair) = owner_map.get(event_id) {
   467	                sum_yes = sum_yes
   468	                    .checked_add(pair.yes.units)
   469	                    .ok_or(MonetaryError::Overflow)?;
   470	                sum_no = sum_no
   471	                    .checked_add(pair.no.units)
   472	                    .ok_or(MonetaryError::Overflow)?;
   473	            }
   474	        }
   475	        let min_side = sum_yes.min(sum_no);
   476	        if min_side != collateral_units {
   477	            // Report the failing side (the smaller one) for diagnostic
   478	            // clarity — that's where the equality-with-collateral broke.
   479	            let (side, share_sum_units) = if sum_yes <= sum_no {
   480	                (OutcomeSide::Yes, sum_yes)
   481	            } else {
   482	                (OutcomeSide::No, sum_no)
   483	            };
   484	            return Err(MonetaryError::CompleteSetUnbalanced {
   485	                event_id_hex: hex_event_id(event_id),
   486	                side,
   487	                share_sum_units,
   488	                collateral_units,
   489	            });
   490	        }
   491	    }
   492	    Ok(())
   493	}

     1	//! TB-13 Atom 5 integration tests — CompleteSet + MarketSeedTx per architect
     2	//! 2026-05-03 post-TB-12 ruling Part A §4.4 SG-13.1..8 + halting triggers.
     3	//!
     4	//! "CompleteSet + MarketSeedTx" — Polymarket / CTF conditional-share
     5	//! substrate. **1 locked Coin = 1 YES_E + 1 NO_E.** TB-13 introduces
     6	//! conditional collateral + share balance accounting; redeem requires
     7	//! system-resolved task-market state (Finalized → Yes; Bankrupt → No).
     8	//! TB-13 does NOT introduce trading / pricing / AMM / orderbook —
     9	//! those are deferred to TB-14+.
    10	//!
    11	//! Coverage maps to architect SG-13.0..8 + halting triggers from
    12	//! charter §3 Atom 5 (total_supply_micro mutation correctness / shares
    13	//! NOT counted as Coin / MarketSeed without provider balance / no
    14	//! legacy CPMM / no f64 / no AMM/CPMM router).
    15	//!
    16	//! - SG-13.0.1 legacy_cpm_api_not_imported_by_complete_set       (Atom 0.5 fence)
    17	//! - SG-13.0.2 no_f64_in_complete_set_or_market_seed              (Atom 0.5 fence)
    18	//! - SG-13.0.3 prediction_market_legacy_quarantined               (Atom 0.5 fence)
    19	//! - SG-13.1   mint_one_coin_yields_one_yes_plus_one_no_total_coin_conserved
    20	//! - SG-13.2   yes_no_shares_not_in_total_coin_supply
    21	//! - SG-13.3   market_seed_fails_if_provider_lacks_balance
    22	//! - SG-13.4   market_seed_cannot_create_liquidity_without_collateral
    23	//! - SG-13.5   redeem_unavailable_before_outcome_resolution
    24	//! - SG-13.6   redeem_after_yes_outcome_pays_yes_not_no
    25	//! - SG-13.7   no_f64_in_new_complete_set_or_market_seed_path     (Atom 0.5 fence)
    26	//! - SG-13.8   no_import_or_use_of_legacy_cpmm_in_tb13_modules    (Atom 0.5 fence)
    27	//!
    28	//! /// TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 5 (architect 2026-05-03 post-TB-12 ruling
    29	//! Part A §4.4 + §4.7 forbidden list; SG-13.0..8).
    30	
    31	use std::collections::BTreeMap;
    32	use std::sync::{Arc, RwLock};
    33	
    34	use tempfile::TempDir;
    35	
    36	use turingosv4::bottom_white::cas::store::CasStore;
    37	use turingosv4::bottom_white::ledger::rejection_evidence::RejectionEvidenceWriter;
    38	use turingosv4::bottom_white::ledger::system_keypair::{
    39	    Ed25519Keypair, PinnedSystemPubkeys, SystemEpoch,
    40	};
    41	use turingosv4::bottom_white::ledger::transition_ledger::{
    42	    InMemoryLedgerWriter, LedgerWriter,
    43	};
    44	use turingosv4::bottom_white::tools::registry::ToolRegistry;
    45	use turingosv4::economy::money::MicroCoin;
    46	use turingosv4::economy::monetary_invariant::{
    47	    assert_complete_set_balanced, assert_total_ctf_conserved,
    48	};
    49	use turingosv4::state::q_state::{
    50	    AgentId, ConditionalCollateralIndex, ConditionalShareBalances, QState,
    51	    ShareSidePair, TaskId, TaskMarketEntry, TaskMarketState, TxId,
    52	};
    53	use turingosv4::state::sequencer::{Sequencer, SubmissionEnvelope};
    54	use turingosv4::state::typed_tx::{
    55	    AgentSignature, CompleteSetMintTx, CompleteSetRedeemTx, EventId,
    56	    MarketSeedTx, OutcomeSide, ShareAmount, TypedTx,
    57	};
    58	use turingosv4::top_white::predicates::registry::PredicateRegistry;
    59	
    60	// ── Harness ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    61	
    62	struct Harness {
    63	    _tmp: TempDir,
    64	    seq: Sequencer,
    65	    rx: tokio::sync::mpsc::Receiver<SubmissionEnvelope>,
    66	    _ledger: Arc<RwLock<dyn LedgerWriter>>,
    67	}
    68	
    69	fn fresh_harness(initial_q: QState) -> Harness {
    70	    let tmp = TempDir::new().expect("tempdir");
    71	    let cas = Arc::new(RwLock::new(CasStore::open(tmp.path()).expect("cas")));
    72	    let keypair = Arc::new(Ed25519Keypair::generate_with_secure_entropy().expect("kp"));
    73	    let writer: Arc<RwLock<dyn LedgerWriter>> =
    74	        Arc::new(RwLock::new(InMemoryLedgerWriter::new()));
    75	    let rejection_writer = Arc::new(RwLock::new(RejectionEvidenceWriter::default()));
    76	    let preds = Arc::new(PredicateRegistry::new());
    77	    let tools = Arc::new(ToolRegistry::new());
    78	    let epoch = SystemEpoch::new(1);
    79	    let mut pinned = PinnedSystemPubkeys::new();
    80	    pinned.insert(epoch, keypair.public_key());
    81	    let pinned_pubkeys = Arc::new(pinned);
    82	    let (seq, rx) = Sequencer::new(
    83	        cas, keypair, epoch, writer.clone(), rejection_writer, preds, tools,
    84	        pinned_pubkeys, initial_q, 16,
    85	    );
    86	    Harness { _tmp: tmp, seq, rx, _ledger: writer }
    87	}
    88	
    89	fn genesis_with_balances(pairs: &[(&str, i64)]) -> QState {
    90	    let mut q = QState::genesis();
    91	    for (name, coin) in pairs {
    92	        q.economic_state_t.balances_t.0.insert(
    93	            AgentId((*name).into()),
    94	            MicroCoin::from_coin(*coin).unwrap(),
    95	        );
    96	    }
    97	    q
    98	}
    99	
   100	/// Pre-populate `task_markets_t[task]` with the given state. Used in
   101	/// SG-13.5 / SG-13.6 to simulate a system-emitted resolution (Finalized
   102	/// or Bankrupt) without going through the full FinalizeReward /
   103	/// TaskBankruptcy flow. The state-flip itself is exercised by TB-8 +
   104	/// TB-11 integration tests.
   105	fn seed_task_market(q: &mut QState, task: &str, state: TaskMarketState) {
   106	    let mut entry = TaskMarketEntry::default();
   107	    entry.state = state;
   108	    q.economic_state_t
   109	        .task_markets_t
   110	        .0
   111	        .insert(TaskId(task.into()), entry);
   112	}
   113	
   114	/// Build a genesis QState with the given balances AND a single
   115	/// task_markets_t entry in Open state for the given task. Used by the
   116	/// happy-path tests post Gemini Q13 gate (mint/seed reject closed/missing
   117	/// events).
   118	fn genesis_with_balances_and_open_task(
   119	    pairs: &[(&str, i64)],
   120	    task: &str,
   121	) -> QState {
   122	    let mut q = genesis_with_balances(pairs);
   123	    seed_task_market(&mut q, task, TaskMarketState::Open);
   124	    q
   125	}
   126	
   127	/// Build a QState that simulates a post-mint snapshot — `mint_owner`
   128	/// has minted `mint_amount_micro` against `task` (event_id) and the
   129	/// task_markets_t state has been flipped to `final_state`. Used by
   130	/// redeem-focused tests so they don't have to drive the actual mint
   131	/// dispatch (which now requires task state == Open per Gemini round-2
   132	/// CHALLENGE Q13 remediation). The post-mint Q-projection is identical
   133	/// to what the dispatch arm would produce.
   134	fn genesis_post_mint(
   135	    pairs: &[(&str, i64)],
   136	    mint_owner: &str,
   137	    task: &str,
   138	    mint_amount_micro: i64,
   139	    final_state: TaskMarketState,
   140	) -> QState {
   141	    let mut q = genesis_with_balances(pairs);
   142	    seed_task_market(&mut q, task, final_state);
   143	
   144	    let agent_id = AgentId(mint_owner.into());
   145	    let event_id = EventId(TaskId(task.into()));
   146	
   147	    // Debit balance.
   148	    let bal = q
   149	        .economic_state_t
   150	        .balances_t
   151	        .0
   152	        .get(&agent_id)
   153	        .copied()
   154	        .unwrap_or(MicroCoin::zero());
   155	    q.economic_state_t.balances_t.0.insert(
   156	        agent_id.clone(),
   157	        MicroCoin::from_micro_units(bal.micro_units() - mint_amount_micro),
   158	    );
   159	
   160	    // Credit collateral.
   161	    q.economic_state_t
   162	        .conditional_collateral_t
   163	        .0
   164	        .insert(event_id.clone(), MicroCoin::from_micro_units(mint_amount_micro));
   165	
   166	    // Credit equal YES + NO shares to the owner.
   167	    let mut owner_shares = std::collections::BTreeMap::new();
   168	    owner_shares.insert(
   169	        event_id,
   170	        ShareSidePair {
   171	            yes: ShareAmount::from_units(mint_amount_micro as u128),
   172	            no: ShareAmount::from_units(mint_amount_micro as u128),
   173	        },
   174	    );
   175	    q.economic_state_t
   176	        .conditional_share_balances_t
   177	        .0
   178	        .insert(agent_id, owner_shares);
   179	
   180	    q
   181	}
   182	
   183	async fn submit_and_apply(h: &mut Harness, tx: TypedTx) -> Result<(), String> {
   184	    h.seq
   185	        .submit_agent_tx(tx)
   186	        .await
   187	        .map_err(|e| format!("submit error: {e:?}"))?;
   188	    let outcome = h
   189	        .seq
   190	        .try_apply_one(&mut h.rx)
   191	        .ok_or_else(|| "no envelope drained".to_string())?;
   192	    outcome
   193	        .map(|_ledger_entry| ())
   194	        .map_err(|e| format!("apply error: {e:?}"))
   195	}
   196	
   197	fn build_mint(parent: turingosv4::state::q_state::Hash, owner: &str, task: &str, micro: i64, seq_no: u64) -> TypedTx {
   198	    TypedTx::CompleteSetMint(CompleteSetMintTx {
   199	        tx_id: TxId(format!("mint-{owner}-{task}-{seq_no}")),
   200	        parent_state_root: parent,
   201	        event_id: EventId(TaskId(task.into())),
   202	        owner: AgentId(owner.into()),
   203	        amount: MicroCoin::from_micro_units(micro),
   204	        signature: AgentSignature::from_bytes([0u8; 64]),
   205	        timestamp_logical: 1000 + seq_no,
   206	    })
   207	}
   208	
   209	fn build_redeem(
   210	    parent: turingosv4::state::q_state::Hash,
   211	    owner: &str,
   212	    task: &str,
   213	    outcome: OutcomeSide,
   214	    units: u128,
   215	    seq_no: u64,
   216	) -> TypedTx {
   217	    TypedTx::CompleteSetRedeem(CompleteSetRedeemTx {
   218	        tx_id: TxId(format!("redeem-{owner}-{task}-{seq_no}")),
   219	        parent_state_root: parent,
   220	        event_id: EventId(TaskId(task.into())),
   221	        owner: AgentId(owner.into()),
   222	        outcome,
   223	        share_amount: ShareAmount::from_units(units),
   224	        signature: AgentSignature::from_bytes([0u8; 64]),
   225	        timestamp_logical: 2000 + seq_no,
   226	    })
   227	}
   228	
   229	fn build_seed(
   230	    parent: turingosv4::state::q_state::Hash,
   231	    provider: &str,
   232	    task: &str,
   233	    micro: i64,
   234	    seq_no: u64,
   235	) -> TypedTx {
   236	    TypedTx::MarketSeed(MarketSeedTx {
   237	        tx_id: TxId(format!("seed-{provider}-{task}-{seq_no}")),
   238	        parent_state_root: parent,
   239	        event_id: EventId(TaskId(task.into())),
   240	        provider: AgentId(provider.into()),
   241	        collateral_amount: MicroCoin::from_micro_units(micro),
   242	        signature: AgentSignature::from_bytes([0u8; 64]),
   243	        timestamp_logical: 3000 + seq_no,
   244	    })
   245	}
   246	
   247	// ── SG-13.1 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   248	
   249	/// SG-13.1 — Mint 1 Coin → 1 YES + 1 NO, total Coin conserved.
   250	#[tokio::test]
   251	async fn sg_13_1_mint_one_coin_yields_one_yes_plus_one_no_total_coin_conserved() {
   252	    let q0 = genesis_with_balances_and_open_task(&[("alice", 100)], "task-A");
   253	    let mut h = fresh_harness(q0);
   254	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   255	
   256	    submit_and_apply(&mut h, build_mint(parent, "alice", "task-A", 5_000_000, 1))
   257	        .await
   258	        .expect("mint accepted");
   259	
   260	    let q = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap();
   260	    let q = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap();
   261	    let alice_bal = q
   262	        .economic_state_t
   263	        .balances_t
   264	        .0
   265	        .get(&AgentId("alice".into()))
   266	        .copied()
   267	        .unwrap();
   268	    assert_eq!(
   269	        alice_bal.micro_units(),
   270	        100_i64 * 1_000_000 - 5_000_000,
   271	        "alice balance must be debited by mint amount"
   272	    );
   273	
   274	    let collateral = q
   275	        .economic_state_t
   276	        .conditional_collateral_t
   277	        .0
   278	        .get(&EventId(TaskId("task-A".into())))
   279	        .copied()
   280	        .unwrap();
   281	    assert_eq!(collateral.micro_units(), 5_000_000, "collateral credited");
   282	
   283	    let pair = q
   284	        .economic_state_t
   285	        .conditional_share_balances_t
   286	        .0
   287	        .get(&AgentId("alice".into()))
   288	        .and_then(|m| m.get(&EventId(TaskId("task-A".into()))))
   289	        .copied()
   290	        .unwrap();
   291	    assert_eq!(pair.yes.units, 5_000_000_u128, "YES shares minted equal to amount");
   292	    assert_eq!(pair.no.units, 5_000_000_u128, "NO shares minted equal to amount");
   293	
   294	    // CTF preserved across mint via 6-holding sum (Atom 3 invariant).
   295	    let q_pre = QState::genesis();
   296	    let mut q_pre_balanced = q_pre.clone();
   297	    q_pre_balanced.economic_state_t.balances_t.0.insert(
   298	        AgentId("alice".into()),
   299	        MicroCoin::from_coin(100).unwrap(),
   300	    );
   301	    assert_total_ctf_conserved(
   302	        &q_pre_balanced.economic_state_t,
   303	        &q.economic_state_t,
   304	        &[],
   305	    )
   306	    .expect("CTF preserved across mint");
   307	    assert_complete_set_balanced(&q.economic_state_t).expect("complete-set balanced post-mint");
   308	}
   309	
   310	// ── SG-13.2 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   311	
   312	/// SG-13.2 — YES/NO shares are not counted in total Coin supply.
   313	///
   314	/// Asserts that `assert_total_ctf_conserved` passes pre/post a mint that
   315	/// creates 5_000_000 YES + 5_000_000 NO shares — if shares were
   316	/// double-counted as Coin, the post sum would be 10_000_000 micro larger
   317	/// than the pre sum and the assertion would fail.
   318	#[tokio::test]
   319	async fn sg_13_2_yes_no_shares_not_in_total_coin_supply() {
   320	    let q0 = genesis_with_balances_and_open_task(&[("alice", 50)], "task-Z");
   321	    let mut h = fresh_harness(q0.clone());
   322	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   323	
   324	    submit_and_apply(&mut h, build_mint(parent, "alice", "task-Z", 12_345_678, 2))
   325	        .await
   326	        .expect("mint accepted");
   327	
   328	    let q = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap();
   329	    // Pre/post 6-holding total must be equal — the conditional shares
   330	    // do NOT contribute to total_supply_micro per CR-13.3.
   331	    assert_total_ctf_conserved(&q0.economic_state_t, &q.economic_state_t, &[])
   332	        .expect("shares are not Coin; sum unchanged");
   333	    assert_complete_set_balanced(&q.economic_state_t).expect("balanced");
   334	}
   335	
   336	// ── SG-13.3 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   337	
   338	/// SG-13.3 — MarketSeedTx fails if provider lacks balance.
   339	#[tokio::test]
   340	async fn sg_13_3_market_seed_fails_if_provider_lacks_balance() {
   341	    // Bob has NO balance row at all. Task-S is pre-Open so Q13 gate
   342	    // (event state) passes; the balance gate is the one that fires.
   343	    let q0 = genesis_with_balances_and_open_task(&[("alice", 100)], "task-S");
   344	    let mut h = fresh_harness(q0);
   345	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   346	
   347	    let err = submit_and_apply(&mut h, build_seed(parent, "bob", "task-S", 1_000_000, 3))
   348	        .await
   349	        .expect_err("seed must fail without provider balance");
   350	    assert!(
   351	        err.contains("InsufficientBalanceForMint"),
   352	        "expected InsufficientBalanceForMint, got: {err}"
   353	    );
   354	}
   355	
   356	// ── SG-13.4 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   357	
   358	/// SG-13.4 — MarketSeedTx cannot create liquidity without collateral
   359	/// (architect §4.7 forbidden list "No automatic liquidity").
   360	#[tokio::test]
   361	async fn sg_13_4_market_seed_cannot_create_liquidity_without_collateral() {
   362	    // Task-X is pre-Open so the Q13 event gate is not the one firing;
   363	    // the zero-collateral gate is.
   364	    let q0 = genesis_with_balances_and_open_task(&[("alice", 100)], "task-X");
   365	    let mut h = fresh_harness(q0);
   366	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   367	
   368	    // collateral_amount == 0 must fail with InsufficientCollateral.
   369	    let err = submit_and_apply(&mut h, build_seed(parent, "alice", "task-X", 0, 4))
   370	        .await
   371	        .expect_err("seed with zero collateral must fail");
   372	    assert!(
   373	        err.contains("InsufficientCollateral"),
   374	        "expected InsufficientCollateral, got: {err}"
   375	    );
   376	}
   377	
   378	// ── SG-13.5 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   379	
   380	/// SG-13.5 — Redeem unavailable before outcome resolution.
   381	///
   382	/// Mint shares; submit redeem when task_markets_t state is `Open`; expect
   383	/// `RedeemBeforeResolution`. Per architect FR-13.4: "CompleteSetRedeemTx
   384	/// is impossible before system-resolved outcome."
   385	#[tokio::test]
   386	async fn sg_13_5_redeem_unavailable_before_outcome_resolution() {
   387	    // Sub-test 1: mint into Open task succeeds; immediate redeem against
   388	    // the still-Open task is rejected with RedeemBeforeResolution.
   389	    let q0 = genesis_with_balances_and_open_task(&[("alice", 100)], "task-O");
   390	    let mut h = fresh_harness(q0);
   391	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   392	
   393	    submit_and_apply(&mut h, build_mint(parent, "alice", "task-O", 5_000_000, 5))
   394	        .await
   395	        .expect("mint accepted");
   396	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   397	
   398	    let err = submit_and_apply(
   399	        &mut h,
   400	        build_redeem(parent, "alice", "task-O", OutcomeSide::Yes, 1_000_000, 6),
   401	    )
   402	    .await
   403	    .expect_err("redeem before resolution must fail");
   404	    assert!(
   405	        err.contains("RedeemBeforeResolution"),
   406	        "expected RedeemBeforeResolution, got: {err}"
   407	    );
   408	
   409	    // Sub-test 2: Expired-state task with pre-baked post-mint state
   410	    // (mint was rejected by Q13 gate when state==Expired, so we use
   411	    // genesis_post_mint to construct the state directly). Redeem is
   412	    // rejected with RedeemBeforeResolution.
   413	    let q1 = genesis_post_mint(
   414	        &[("bob", 100)],
   415	        "bob",
   416	        "task-E",
   417	        2_000_000,
   418	        TaskMarketState::Expired,
   419	    );
   420	    let mut h2 = fresh_harness(q1);
   421	    let parent = h2.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   422	    let err = submit_and_apply(
   423	        &mut h2,
   424	        build_redeem(parent, "bob", "task-E", OutcomeSide::No, 500_000, 8),
   425	    )
   426	    .await
   427	    .expect_err("redeem on expired must fail");
   428	    assert!(
   429	        err.contains("RedeemBeforeResolution"),
   430	        "expected RedeemBeforeResolution on Expired state, got: {err}"
   431	    );
   432	}
   433	
   434	// ── SG-13.6 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   435	
   436	/// SG-13.6 — Redeem after YES outcome pays YES, not NO.
   437	#[tokio::test]
   438	async fn sg_13_6_redeem_after_yes_outcome_pays_yes_not_no() {
   439	    // Use pre-baked post-mint state with task=Finalized — mint dispatch
   440	    // would now reject Finalized state per Q13 gate, so we build the
   441	    // post-mint state directly to focus the test on redeem semantics.
   442	    let q0 = genesis_post_mint(
   443	        &[("alice", 100)],
   444	        "alice",
   445	        "task-Y",
   446	        4_000_000,
   447	        TaskMarketState::Finalized,
   448	    );
   449	    let mut h = fresh_harness(q0);
   450	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   451	
   452	    submit_and_apply(
   453	        &mut h,
   454	        build_redeem(parent, "alice", "task-Y", OutcomeSide::Yes, 4_000_000, 10),
   455	    )
   456	    .await
   457	    .expect("redeem yes accepted");
   458	
   459	    let q = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap();
   460	    let alice_bal = q
   461	        .economic_state_t
   462	        .balances_t
   463	        .0
   464	        .get(&AgentId("alice".into()))
   465	        .copied()
   466	        .unwrap();
   467	    // 100 Coin = 100_000_000 micro; -4M (mint) +4M (yes redeem) = 100M unchanged.
   468	    assert_eq!(
   469	        alice_bal.micro_units(),
   470	        100_000_000_i64,
   471	        "alice balance restored after YES redeem"
   472	    );
   473	
   474	    let pair = q
   475	        .economic_state_t
   476	        .conditional_share_balances_t
   477	        .0
   478	        .get(&AgentId("alice".into()))
   479	        .and_then(|m| m.get(&EventId(TaskId("task-Y".into()))))
   480	        .copied()
   481	        .unwrap();
   482	    assert_eq!(pair.yes.units, 0_u128, "YES shares debited (winning side)");
   483	    assert_eq!(pair.no.units, 4_000_000_u128, "NO shares preserved (losing side)");
   484	
   485	    // Now attempt redeem outcome=No on the SAME finalized event — must fail
   486	    // because state is Finalized (YES wins) and the redeem outcome is No.
   487	    let parent = h.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   488	    let err = submit_and_apply(
   489	        &mut h,
   490	        build_redeem(parent, "alice", "task-Y", OutcomeSide::No, 1_000_000, 11),
   491	    )
   492	    .await
   493	    .expect_err("redeem outcome=No on Finalized event must fail");
   494	    assert!(
   495	        err.contains("InvalidResolutionRef"),
   496	        "expected InvalidResolutionRef, got: {err}"
   497	    );
   498	
   499	    // Symmetric check: Bankrupt event with outcome=Yes must fail; with
   500	    // outcome=No must succeed. Use pre-baked post-mint state.
   501	    let q_b = genesis_post_mint(
   502	        &[("bob", 50)],
   503	        "bob",
   504	        "task-B",
   505	        1_000_000,
   506	        TaskMarketState::Bankrupt,
   507	    );
   508	    let mut hb = fresh_harness(q_b);
   509	    let parent = hb.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   510	    let err = submit_and_apply(
   511	        &mut hb,
   512	        build_redeem(parent, "bob", "task-B", OutcomeSide::Yes, 500_000, 13),
   513	    )
   514	    .await
   515	    .expect_err("Bankrupt with outcome=Yes must reject");
   516	    assert!(err.contains("InvalidResolutionRef"));
   517	    let parent = hb.seq.q_snapshot().unwrap().state_root_t;
   518	    submit_and_apply(
   519	        &mut hb,
   520	        build_redeem(parent, "bob", "task-B", OutcomeSide::No, 500_000, 14),
   521	    )
   522	    .await
   523	    .expect("Bankrupt with outcome=No must succeed");
   524	}
   525	
   526	// ── SG-13.7 / SG-13.8 — fence delegation ────────────────────────────────────
   527	//
   528	// SG-13.7 (no f64 in CompleteSet/MarketSeed path) and SG-13.8 (no
   529	// import/use of legacy CPMM in TB-13 modules) are enforced by Atom 0.5
   530	// forward-fence in `tests/tb_13_legacy_cpmm_forward_fence.rs`. This file

    72	    ChallengeResolve = 9,

    74	    /// failure marker. Future TB-12 NodeMarket Short / NO settlement uses

    79	    TaskBankruptcy  = 10,

    84	    /// Coin → 1 YES + 1 NO; shares are claims, not Coin).

    97	    /// pricing.** TB-13 records only the fact of seeding, not any signal

handover/alignment/OBS_RESOLUTIONS_INDEX_TB15_2026-05-03.md:67:- Make `ResolutionRef.resolution_tx_id` validation explicit (lookup in
handover/alignment/OBS_R022_TB13_RESOLUTIONREF_REMOVED_2026-05-03.md:1:# OBS R-022 — TB-13 ResolutionRef removed (TRACE_MATRIX backlink retired)
handover/alignment/OBS_R022_TB13_RESOLUTIONREF_REMOVED_2026-05-03.md:5:**Removed symbol**: `pub struct ResolutionRef { resolution_tx_id, claimed_outcome }` in `src/state/typed_tx.rs`.
handover/alignment/OBS_R022_TB13_RESOLUTIONREF_REMOVED_2026-05-03.md:10:ResolutionRef carried two dead fields:
handover/alignment/OBS_R022_TB13_RESOLUTIONREF_REMOVED_2026-05-03.md:12:- `resolution_tx_id: TxId` — documented in round-4 as opaque traceability metadata, NOT validated against L4 (the sequencer ignores it; `task_markets_t[event_id.0].state` is the live truth-of-resolution). A field that no code consumes is wire weight, not architecture.
handover/alignment/OBS_R022_TB13_RESOLUTIONREF_REMOVED_2026-05-03.md:13:- `claimed_outcome: OutcomeSide` — a redundant copy of `CompleteSetRedeemTx.outcome`. Used only by an inner-consistency gate `redeem.outcome != redeem.resolution_ref.claimed_outcome → InvalidResolutionRef`. That gate was dead defense-in-depth: the agent signature covers both fields, so any tampering that desynchronized them would break the signature first.
handover/alignment/OBS_R022_TB13_RESOLUTIONREF_REMOVED_2026-05-03.md:19:The TB-13 typed-tx surface is still flowchart-anchored — `CompleteSetRedeemTx` itself retains its `TRACE_MATRIX TB-13 Atom 1 (architect §4.3 + FR-13.4..5 + SG-13.5..6)` backlink at `src/state/typed_tx.rs`. ResolutionRef was an internal helper type without an independent flowchart role. Removing the type cleanly removes the backlink — there is no orphan code; the role it carried (claimed-outcome assertion) is now expressed directly via `CompleteSetRedeemTx.outcome`.
handover/alignment/OBS_R022_TB13_RESOLUTIONREF_REMOVED_2026-05-03.md:25:- SG-13.6 (`sg_13_6_redeem_after_yes_outcome_pays_yes_not_no`): PASS unchanged — including both mismatch checks (Finalized + outcome=No → `InvalidResolutionRef`; Bankrupt + outcome=Yes → `InvalidResolutionRef`). The match arm using `(market_state, redeem.outcome)` produces identical rejection behavior to the previous `(market_state, claimed_outcome)` form because all fixtures set `claimed_outcome = outcome` (the inner-consistency check could never independently fire on an honestly-signed tx).
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2.md:46:**Q3 (outcome match)**: Can Redeem with `outcome=Yes` and a Bankrupt-task resolution_ref bypass the outcome check? Sequencer must reject with `InvalidResolutionRef` when state-vs-outcome mismatch. Test: `sg_13_6` includes 2 mismatch checks (Finalized+No rejected; Bankrupt+Yes rejected). Also: `redeem.outcome != redeem.resolution_ref.claimed_outcome` is a separate gate that fires before state lookup — defense-in-depth.
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2.md:62:**RQ1 — Anti-forgery enforcement**: A malformed CompleteSetRedeemTx where wire `outcome` differs from `resolution_ref.claimed_outcome` — does the dispatch arm reject pre-state-lookup? Trace `src/state/sequencer.rs` CompleteSetRedeem step 1.
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2.md:93:**RQ5 — ResolutionRef integrity**: TB-13 uses `ResolutionRef { resolution_tx_id, claimed_outcome }` but the sequencer ONLY validates the task_market state (Finalized/Bankrupt) + the claimed_outcome match. The `resolution_tx_id` is opaque traceability metadata, NOT validated against L4. Is this safe? Argument: task_markets_t.state IS the on-chain state-of-truth for resolution; resolution_tx_id is for L4-audit replay. Charge: a malicious agent could submit a CompleteSetRedeemTx with resolution_tx_id pointing to a non-existent or wrong tx. Is this a concern? Sequencer ignores resolution_tx_id at validation — only the task_market state matters. Is this the right design or a security gap?
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2.md:273:**FC-trace**: `Art. 0.2` (Tape Canonical — `CompleteSetMintTx` / `CompleteSetRedeemTx` / `MarketSeedTx` canonical-encoded; replay-deterministic) + `Art. I.1` (5-step compile loop — conditional collateral and share accounting are part of the proposal-pricing substrate, but DO NOT affect predicate outcome; CR-13.6 explicit) + `Art. III.4` (no fake accepted preserved — Redeem requires system-resolved outcome reference; agent-callable Redeem rejected pre-resolution) + `Art. V.1.3` (Anti-Oreo — `MarketSeedTx` requires explicit provider funds, NO automatic seed; `CompleteSetMintTx` is agent-driven balance debit, no money created) + `WP-§14.1` (typed_tx variant additive bumps; 3 NEW typed-tx variants; CompleteSetRedeem additionally accepts a `ResolutionRef` from system-emitted resolution; not a unilateral agent variant since pre-resolution rejection is sequencer-side gate) + `WP-§19` (RSP-M collateral substrate — conditional collateral is the YES_E + NO_E claim foundation that TB-14 PriceIndex will derive prices from).

handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2.md:4962:tests/tb_13_complete_set.rs:56:    MarketSeedTx, OutcomeSide, ResolutionRef, ShareAmount, TypedTx,
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2.md:6537:handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2.md:34:**Finding**: No. The `CompleteSetRedeemTx` accept arm in `src/state/sequencer.rs:1852-1866` contains a nested `match` that strictly enforces consistency between the on-chain `market_state` and the transaction's `redeem.outcome`. A `TaskMarketState::Bankrupt` (NO outcome) paired with an `outcome=Yes` redeem attempt will fall through to the `(_, _)` arm and be rejected with `Err(TransitionError::InvalidResolutionRef)`. The integration test `sg_13_6_redeem_after_yes_outcome_pays_yes_not_no` (`tests/tb_13_complete_set.rs:199`) includes symmetric checks for this mismatch.
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2.md:6540:handover/audits/GEMINI_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2.md:74:**Finding**: Yes. The `ResolutionRef` struct (`src/state/typed_tx.rs:1019`) points to a `resolution_tx_id`. The sequencer logic (`src/state/sequencer.rs:1852`) currently hardcodes the accepted resolution transaction types (`TaskBankruptcyTx`, `FinalizeRewardTx`). To support a new resolver (e.g., a ChallengeCourt emitting a `CourtRulingTx`), the `match` statement can be extended. The model of referencing an on-chain, system-emitted fact is fundamentally robust and extensible.
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2.md:6596:Non-blocking challenges: `assert_complete_set_balanced` is test-only, not called by TB-13 dispatch arms ([monetary_invariant.rs](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs:457); no `src/` callers). `ResolutionRef.resolution_tx_id` is documented as L4-validated, but the sequencer ignores it and uses only `task_markets_t` state ([typed_tx.rs](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/src/state/typed_tx.rs:1128), [sequencer.rs](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/src/state/sequencer.rs:1683)). The forward fence catches the prompt’s exact top-level import example inside fixed scope, but fixed `FENCE_SCOPE` still misses new unlisted TB-13 files ([tb_13_legacy_cpmm_forward_fence.rs](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/tests/tb_13_legacy_cpmm_forward_fence.rs:51)).
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R2.md:6612:Non-blocking challenges: `assert_complete_set_balanced` is test-only, not called by TB-13 dispatch arms ([monetary_invariant.rs](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/src/economy/monetary_invariant.rs:457); no `src/` callers). `ResolutionRef.resolution_tx_id` is documented as L4-validated, but the sequencer ignores it and uses only `task_markets_t` state ([typed_tx.rs](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/src/state/typed_tx.rs:1128), [sequencer.rs](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/src/state/sequencer.rs:1683)). The forward fence catches the prompt’s exact top-level import example inside fixed scope, but fixed `FENCE_SCOPE` still misses new unlisted TB-13 files ([tb_13_legacy_cpmm_forward_fence.rs](/home/zephryj/projects/turingosv4/tests/tb_13_legacy_cpmm_forward_fence.rs:51)).
handover/audits/run_gemini_tb_13_ship_audit_r4.py:55:edbc555  TB-13 Atom 6 round-5 — Codex RQ5 remediation: drop ResolutionRef wrapper
handover/audits/run_gemini_tb_13_ship_audit_r4.py:64:**RQ5 — drop ResolutionRef wrapper**: ResolutionRef struct + resolution_tx_id + claimed_outcome fields removed from CompleteSetRedeemTx + signing payload. Inner-consistency check removed from sequencer. State-mismatch path preserved via existing match arm using `redeem.outcome` directly. CompleteSetRedeemTx 9→8 fields; signing payload 8→7. Wire-format break — no production rows yet. Trust Root rehashed for typed_tx / sequencer / transition_ledger. R-022 skip token at `handover/alignment/OBS_R022_TB13_RESOLUTIONREF_REMOVED_2026-05-03.md`.
handover/audits/run_gemini_tb_13_ship_audit_r4.py:76:3. Can Redeem with `outcome=Yes` against a Bankrupt event bypass the outcome check? (Must be rejected with `InvalidResolutionRef`. Round-5 RQ5 simplified the gate — single state-vs-outcome match arm now; no inner-consistency check.)
handover/audits/run_gemini_tb_13_ship_audit_r4.py:88:12. With ResolutionRef now removed (round-5 RQ5), is the redeem-mechanism-coupling concern from your round-3 Q12 CHALLENGE addressed, partially addressed, or unchanged? Specifically: does removing the resolution_ref wrapper make TB-15+ multi-resolver evolution easier (fewer wire fields to reshape) or harder (lost a future-extension hook)?
handover/audits/run_gemini_tb_13_ship_audit_r4.py:191:    f"**Round-5 closures**: RQ3 (chaintape replay smoke) + Q9/RQ6 (type-use fence) + RQ5 (ResolutionRef wrapper drop)\n"
handover/audits/run_gemini_tb_13_ship_audit.py:50:3. Can Redeem with `outcome=Yes` and a TaskBankruptcy-style resolution_ref bypass the outcome check? (Must be rejected with `InvalidResolutionRef`.)
handover/audits/run_gemini_tb_13_ship_audit.py:62:12. Is the `ResolutionRef` model robust to multi-resolver scenarios in TB-15+?
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R1.md:46:**Q3 (outcome match)**: Can Redeem with `outcome=Yes` and a Bankrupt-task resolution_ref bypass the outcome check? Sequencer must reject with `InvalidResolutionRef` when state-vs-outcome mismatch. Test: `sg_13_6` includes 2 mismatch checks (Finalized+No rejected; Bankrupt+Yes rejected). Also: `redeem.outcome != redeem.resolution_ref.claimed_outcome` is a separate gate that fires before state lookup — defense-in-depth.
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R1.md:62:**RQ1 — Anti-forgery enforcement**: A malformed CompleteSetRedeemTx where wire `outcome` differs from `resolution_ref.claimed_outcome` — does the dispatch arm reject pre-state-lookup? Trace `src/state/sequencer.rs` CompleteSetRedeem step 1.
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R1.md:93:**RQ5 — ResolutionRef integrity**: TB-13 uses `ResolutionRef { resolution_tx_id, claimed_outcome }` but the sequencer ONLY validates the task_market state (Finalized/Bankrupt) + the claimed_outcome match. The `resolution_tx_id` is opaque traceability metadata, NOT validated against L4. Is this safe? Argument: task_markets_t.state IS the on-chain state-of-truth for resolution; resolution_tx_id is for L4-audit replay. Charge: a malicious agent could submit a CompleteSetRedeemTx with resolution_tx_id pointing to a non-existent or wrong tx. Is this a concern? Sequencer ignores resolution_tx_id at validation — only the task_market state matters. Is this the right design or a security gap?
handover/audits/CODEX_TB_13_SHIP_AUDIT_2026-05-03_R1.md:1413:    19	**FC-trace**: `Art. 0.2` (Tape Canonical — `CompleteSetMintTx` / `CompleteSetRedeemTx` / `MarketSeedTx` canonical-encoded; replay-deterministic) + `Art. I.1` (5-step compile loop — conditional collateral and share accounting are part of the proposal-pricing substrate, but DO NOT affect predicate outcome; CR-13.6 explicit) + `Art. III.4` (no fake accepted preserved — Redeem requires system-resolved outcome reference; agent-callable Redeem rejected pre-resolution) + `Art. V.1.3` (Anti-Oreo — `MarketSeedTx` requires explicit provider funds, NO automatic seed; `CompleteSetMintTx` is agent-driven balance debit, no money created) + `WP-§14.1` (typed_tx variant additive bumps; 3 NEW typed-tx variants; CompleteSetRedeem additionally accepts a `ResolutionRef` from system-emitted resolution; not a unilateral agent variant since pre-resolution rejection is sequencer-side gate) + `WP-§19` (RSP-M collateral substrate — conditional collateral is the YES_E + NO_E claim foundation that TB-14 PriceIndex will derive prices from).
